headline: NASA will wear high-tech Prada long johns to the Moon
summary: Prada and Axiom Space collaborated on the new AxEMU spacesuit. Astronauts will wear a Liquid Cooling and Ventilation Garment (LCVG) underneath. This base layer is crucial for keeping the crew comfortable on Artemis IV in 2028.

headline: The 7 biggest storylines from Summer Game Fest 2026
summary: Summer Game Fest 2026 was a hectic event for the industry. It showcased strength through major announcements. Hardware details were largely overlooked.

headline: Persona 6 exists, and that’s all we know
summary: Summer Game Fest 2026 was a good event for Japanese RPG fans. The Final Fantasy VII remake trilogy conclusion was announced. Atlus confirmed Persona 6 with a brief teaser.

headline: Microsoft’s Xbox 25th anniversary console comes in translucent green
summary: Microsoft unveiled a special edition Xbox Series X for its 25th anniversary. Both the console and controller feature a translucent green design. This design draws inspiration from the original Xbox.

headline: Spider-Man: Brand New Day's Second Trailer Leaks Online, With Sony Now Issuing Copyright Takedowns
summary: The second trailer for 'Spider-Man: Brand New Day' leaked online. Sony is actively issuing copyright takedowns. The leak occurred ahead of its official reveal.

headline: Hellblade Developer Ninja Theory Has Cancelled Project Mara
summary: Ninja Theory, developer of Hellblade, has cancelled Project Mara. This experimental horror game was planned to be set entirely in a single apartment. No reasons for the cancellation were immediately provided.

headline: Xbox Game Exclusivity Will Be Decided on a 'Case-by-Case' Basis, Microsoft Says
summary: Xbox exec Matt Booty clarified Microsoft's new position on game exclusivity. Decisions will now be made on a 'case-by-case' basis. This follows revelations about certain titles remaining exclusive.

headline: Will 007 First Light Get a Sequel? The Boss of Amazon Games Responds
summary: The boss of Amazon Games discussed a potential sequel for '007 First Light'. A follow-up depends on strong player desire. The original game has garnered significant interest.

headline: Iran releases footage of missiles launched at Israel
summary: Iran released footage showing missiles launched towards Israel. Iran stated these attacks were 'the beginning of a full week of continuous strikes.' Tensions remain high in the region.

headline: Nottingham attacks inquiry revealed miscarriage of justice, victim's mother says
summary: Families of Valdo Calocane's victims spoke at a London press conference. The victim's mother stated the inquiry revealed a miscarriage of justice. This concerns the handling of the Nottingham attacks case.

headline: Rare footage captured of Great White shark in Mediterranean Sea
summary: A volunteer diver filmed an endangered Great White shark. The encounter occurred between Tunisia and Sicily. This rare footage highlights the shark's presence in the Mediterranean.

headline: Christian Eriksen 'in good spirits' after collapsing in Denmark game, team's doctor says
summary: Christian Eriksen is 'in good spirits' after collapsing during a match against Ukraine. Denmark's team doctor expects him to be discharged from hospital soon. His condition is stable and improving.
